headline: Evergy Schedules Conference Call to Discuss 1st Quarter Results
summary: KANSAS CITY, Mo., April 16, 2026--Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) announced today it will release its 2026 first quarter earnings Thursday, May 7, 2026, before market open. The company plans to host its quarterly conference call and audio webcast to discuss the results Thursday, May 7, 2026.

raw.headline: Evergy Schedules Conference Call to Discuss 1st Quarter Results
raw.summary: KANSAS CITY, Mo., April 16, 2026--Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) announced today it will release its 2026 first quarter earnings Thursday, May 7, 2026, before market open. The company plans to host its quarterly conference call and audio webcast to discuss the results Thursday, May 7, 2026.
